mapper.select: SELECT P.PRODUCTID as productId, P.NAME, P.DESCN as description, P.CATEGORY as categoryId, I.ITEMID as itemId, I.LISTPRICE as listPrice, I.ATTR1 as attribute1, COALESCE(V.QTY, 0) as stock FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON P.PRODUCTID = I.PRODUCTID LEFT JOIN INVENTORY V ON I.ITEMID = V.ITEMID WHERE P.CATEGORY = #{categoryId}
SELECT PRODUCTID as productId, NAME, DESCN as description, CATEGORY as categoryId FROM PRODUCT WHERE CATEGORY = #{categoryId}
SELECT PRODUCTID as productId, NAME, DESCN as description, CATEGORY as categoryId FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCTID = #{productId}

SELECT DISTINCT P.PRODUCTID as productId, P.NAME, P.DESCN AS description, P.CATEGORY AS categoryId FROM PRODUCT P JOIN CATEGORY C ON P.CATEGORY = C.CATID LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON P.PRODUCTID = I.PRODUCTID WHERE LOWER(P.NAME) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(P.DESCN) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(C.NAME) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(C.DESCN) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(I.ATTR1) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(I.ATTR2) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(I.ATTR3) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY P.PRODUCTID
